subparts.text: What is a Dividend Decision? Explain how it is interlinked with other financial decisions that a financial manager has to make.
Particular 2024 2025 Sales 35000 42000 Variable Cost 40% of Sales Fixed Cost 15000 Calculate Operating Leverage
Explain the Net Income Approach with relevant example
What do you understand by Interest Tax Shield? Explain with example
Compute Loan amount of Rs. 4000 is paid every year @ 12% P.A for a period of 15 Years. Calculate based on Compounded Annually
What do you understand by the term Time Value of Money? Explain the factors that affect the Time Value of Money.
Explain the goal of financial decision making and in what ways is the wealth maximization is superior to the profit maximization objective?
What is Operating and Financial Leverage? Explain its significance with relevant examples
Define Weighted Average Cost of Capital. What is an optimal capital structure for a company, and what key factors influence the determination of an optimal capital structure?

The following is the capital structure of ABC Ltd. Particulars Amount 12% Preference Share 15,00,000 Equity Shares 55,00,000 9% Debentures 20,00,000 1. The debentures are issued at a face value of Rs. 100 with a discount of 5% 2. The Preference Share are issued at a face value of Rs. 100 with a premium of 6% 3. Cost of Equity is 18%. The tax rate for the given period is 20%. Calculate WACC. Calculators are allowed.
